name: python3-wsaccel
title: python3-wsaccel
summary: Accelerator for ws4py and AutobahnPython - Python 3.x
description:
Accelerator for ws4py and AutobahnPython - Python 3.x
WSAccell is WebSocket accelerator for AutobahnPython, ws4py and Tornado. It
replaces per-byte process in them with Cython version. AutobahnPython
beginning with version 0.6 automatically uses WSAccell if available.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-wsaccel because Accelerator for ws4py and AutobahnPython - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-wsaccel as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-wsaccel with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-wsaccel --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
